turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: I ordered the signed Kobe Bryant jersey for $120, but the one I received was unsigned. This is really frustrating.

meta.speaker: Buyer
meta.message: I ordered the signed Kobe Bryant jersey for $120, but the one I received was unsigned. This is really frustrating.

turns.speaker: Seller
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. According to our records, the signed version was listed at $150.

meta.speaker: Seller
meta.message: I'm sorry to hear that. According to our records, the signed version was listed at $150.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: The listing clearly showed it as signed. I paid $120 expecting that. I would like a full refund.

meta.speaker: Buyer
meta.message: The listing clearly showed it as signed. I paid $120 expecting that. I would like a full refund.

turns.speaker: Seller
turns.text: I understand your concern. Would you consider a partial refund of $40 instead?

meta.speaker: Seller
meta.message: I understand your concern. Would you consider a partial refund of $40 instead?

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: That feels unfair. I really wanted the signed jersey. I’m pretty upset about this.

meta.speaker: Buyer
meta.message: That feels unfair. I really wanted the signed jersey. I’m pretty upset about this.

turns.speaker: Mediator
turns.text: Perhaps both sides can clarify expectations and explore options for a mutually acceptable resolution.

meta.speaker: Mediator
meta.message: Perhaps both sides can clarify expectations and explore options for a mutually acceptable resolution.

turns.speaker: Seller
turns.text: We could offer a $60 refund and a discount on a future purchase.

meta.speaker: Seller
meta.message: We could offer a $60 refund and a discount on a future purchase.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: If you refund $80, I’d be willing to keep the jersey.

meta.speaker: Buyer
meta.message: If you refund $80, I’d be willing to keep the jersey.

turns.speaker: Seller
turns.text: Alright, we can agree to an $80 refund to resolve this.

meta.speaker: Seller
meta.message: Alright, we can agree to an $80 refund to resolve this.

turns.speaker: Buyer
turns.text: Okay, that works for me. Thank you for resolving this.
